morning.text: LAND at Narita (Royal Brunei). Clear immigration. Buy a bottle of green tea immediately for hydration.
TRAIN: Keisei Skyliner -> Keisei-Ueno. Relax and enjoy the countryside view. The fastest way into the city.
ARRIVE Ueno. Drop Bags at Hotel. Leave bags at front desk (Check-in is 15:00). Keep valuables and passport with you.
WALK: Ueno Park (The 'Adrenaline' Walk). Walk through the main park avenue. Stop by Toshogu Shrine (Gold Shrine) if you have energy. Fresh air to fight jet lag.
WALK: To Nezu via Cemetery. Exit the back of the park. Quiet, historic neighborhood path.

Lunch: Kamachiku (Nezu). The Hidden Gem: Udon served in a 1910 stone warehouse with a garden view. Shoes off, tatami mats. Perfect peace after the flight. Order: 'Kama-age' (Hot dipping) or 'Zaru' (Cold).

afternoon.text: Stroll: Yanaka Ginza (Optional). Old-school shopping street. If you are dying of tiredness, skip this and head back to Ueno immediately.
RETURN: Walk or Train back to Ueno Hotel. Grab key, get into room.
NAP PROTOCOL (Strict 90 Mins). Rules: Shower immediately (Hot/Cold contrast). Set alarm for 1.5 Hours. Do NOT sleep longer or you ruin the night.
WAKE UP. Force yourself out. It will be hard. Go outside immediately.

evening.text: Ameyoko Exploration Strategy. Choose Your Fighter (Snack Strategy): 1. The Refresher: Fresh Fruit Stick. 2. The Local King: 'Niku no Ooyama' Menchi Katsu. 3. The Sugar: 'Coco-chan' Baby Castella. 4. The Boost: Boss Coffee (Black) from Vending Machine.
Wander: London Sports or Niki no Kashi. Visual overload to keep you awake. Discount candy and crazy sneaker piles.

Dinner: Kamo to Negi (Duck Ramen). Why Here: Tier S rating, fast turnover. Rich duck broth + leeks. 3 mins from Ameyoko. CRITICAL PRO-TIP: You MUST buy your ramen ticket from the vending machine FIRST, and then get into the physical line.
Konbini Raid & Crash. Buy 2L Water and breakfast for tomorrow, get Famichiki/Lawson Chicken, get pudding. Sleep by 21:00.
RETURN: The 'Cool Down' Walk Home. Route: Walk along the main road (Chuo-dori), not the back alleys, for better lighting/safety.

morning.text: DEPART HOTEL. Walk to Ueno-Okachimachi Station (~5 mins).
TRAIN: Toei Oedo Line -> Toshimaen Station. The Themed Commute: A direct line with zero transfers. The station itself is heavily themed. Perfect for taking photos before the actual tour begins.

Warner Bros. Studio Tour Tokyo. Tactical Entry: A massive 4-hour walkthrough. Pay special attention to the 'Creature Effects' and 'Art Department' sections to see the underlying architecture and animatronic mechanics.

afternoon.text: DEPART Studio. Train to Nerima, then Bus to Nakano. Smart Route: Take the Oedo Line one stop back to Nerima, then catch Kanto Bus #41 straight to Nakano. This avoids doubling back through central Tokyo.

Lunch: Chuka Soba Aoba (Nakano Main Store). The Legend: This is the shop that invented the 'Double Soup' (Pork + Seafood) style. It is fast, efficient, and iconic, giving you more time for Nakano Broadway.
Nakano Broadway. Mandarake (2F-4F). Gundam Mission: Spend your afternoon hunting for Pokemon cards and Gundams across the upper floors.

Snack: Daily Chi-co (B1F Nakano Broadway). The Sweet Reward: Head down to the basement (B1) of Nakano Broadway. They are famous for their giant 8-layer soft serve ice cream. Split one before leaving the mall.

evening.text: DEPART Nakano. Train -> Kanda -> Okachimachi.
Dinner: Gyukatsu Aona (Okachimachi). Muscle Recovery: Aona uses Lean Red Meat/A5 Wagyu (not injected fat). 5 mins walk from your hotel area. Much more authentic than tourist traps.
RETURN: Walk back to Hop Inn Ueno.

morning.text: DEPART HOTEL. Walk to Ueno Station (~8 mins).
TRAIN: JR Yamanote Line -> Yurakucho Station.
TRANSFER: Exit JR Yurakucho. Walk to Yurakucho Subway (Yurakucho Line). Board train to Toyosu.
ARRIVE Toyosu Station. Walk 10 mins to TeamLab.
TeamLab Planets (Pre-booked). Prep: Wear shorts that roll up easily (water is knee-deep). Avoid skirts.

afternoon.text: Lunch: Toyosu Senkyaku Banrai — Edo seafood-street lunch. A vibrant culinary street next to the market.
Manyo Club Onsen / Foot Bath. Relax and soak your feet after a long morning of walking.
ESCAPE: Take Yurikamome Line -> Shimbashi Station. Leaving now guarantees you beat the 19:30 dinner rush in the city.

evening.text: Dinner: Uokin OR Tsujihan. Option A (The Local Legend): Uokin Shimbashi. Loud, authentic Izakaya. Option B (Culinary Heaven): Tsujihan (Nihonbashi). The 'Seafood Jewel Box' bowl.
TRAIN: Return to Base. From Shimbashi: Take JR Yamanote Line (Green) or Keihin-Tohoku Line (Blue) -> Ueno Station.

morning.text: DEPART HOTEL. Walk to Ueno Station (~8 mins).
TRAIN: JR Yamanote Line (Direct) -> Harajuku Station.
ARRIVE Harajuku. Walk to Meiji Shrine Forest (West Exit). Walk through the giant Torii gate into the forest. A peaceful start before the chaos.
Takeshita Street Strategy (Crepes vs Chaos). The Crepe Decision: Buy a Marion Crepe here to share. Warning: If you eat a whole one, you might be too full for Flipper's Pancakes later.
Shopping: Kiddy Land (Omotesando). Chiikawa Zone: Located inside. Buy your plushies/goods here. 4 floors of character goods.

afternoon.text: WALK: Harajuku -> Shibuya via Miyashita Park. Walk along Cat Street, then go up to the Rooftop Park at Miyashita.
Lunch: Kiwamiya Hamburg (Parco B1F). Strategy: Grill your own Wagyu hamburg. Alts: Hikiniku to Kome.
Dessert: Flipper's Shibuya. Protocol: If you didn't eat the Crepe earlier, this is the main event. Order the 'Kiseki Pancake' (Miracle Pancake).
WALK: To Scramble Square. Elevator to Sky.
Shibuya Sky (Sunset Slot). Pre-booked: Watch the sunset over Mt. Fuji (if clear) and the scramble crossing below.

evening.text: TRANSIT: Shibuya -> Ikebukuro (Fukutoshin Line). Fast express train (15 mins) to Ikebukuro.

Gap Strategy: Gunpla & Smart Shopping. Consolidation Move: Do your Gundam/Anime shopping at Yamada Denki LABI1 (6F) NOW instead of Day 8. Afterwards, hit Seiyu Supermarket or Donki West Exit for cheap snacks.
Dinner: Yakiniku Rikimaru (Ikebukuro). Reservation: 20:00 Slot. High-value Osaka-style Wagyu AYCE. Order via tablet.
Return to Ueno (JR Yamanote). Safety Check: The train takes 16 mins. You will be back in Ueno by 22:30.

morning.text: DEPART HOTEL. Walk to Ueno Station. Weekday rush hour is ending. Trains should be okay.
TRAIN: JR Ueno-Tokyo Line (Green Car). Green Car Protocol: Buy via Suica Green Car machine, tap Suica on the ceiling reader above your seat.
ARRIVE Kamakura Station. DECISION TIME (Bike vs Tram). Traffic is light on Tuesdays. Bikes are highly recommended.
Great Buddha (Kotoku-in). Optional stop: Hase-dera near the Great Buddha (cut it day-of if your legs are gone).

afternoon.text: RETURN BIKES. Lunch at Komachi-dori. Head to the main street for food.
Lunch: Onigiri Konga (Unagi Butter). Target the Unagi Butter Onigiri. Grab Giraffa Curry Bread as side dish.
Tsurugaoka Hachimangu Shrine.
TRAIN: Kamakura -> Ueno. Use the same Green Car protocol if you are tired.

evening.text: Dinner: Ponta (Tonkatsu). Strategy: Historic pedigree classic. Alternative: Tonkatsu Yamabe (Comfort, cheap, crispy local favorite).
RETURN: Short Walk to Hotel. Since you dined in Ueno, just walk back. Stop at a pharmacy if you need foot detox sheets.

morning.text: DEPART HOTEL. Walk to Ueno Station (Metro Gates).
TRAIN: Hibiya Line (Gray) -> Higashi-Ginza Station.
ARRIVE Hanayama Udon. Join physical line.
TICKET PULL. Get number from machine. You have 75 mins.
Gap Filler: Walk 2 mins to Itoya Ginza.
Lunch: Hanayama Udon (or Rengatei). Primary Target: 'Oni-Himokawa' (Wide Noodle). Backup Target: Rengatei.

afternoon.text: Dessert: age.3 (Fried Sandwich). Walk 5 mins from Udon. The viral fried bread sandwich. Cream/Fruit filling.
WALK: To Yurakucho Station (JR).
TRAIN: JR Keiyo Line -> Kasai-Rinkai-Koen Station.
Tokyo Sea Life Park. Tuna Tank.
DEPART Aquarium. Walk back to Station.
TRAIN: Keiyo Line -> Hatchobori -> Transfer Yurakucho Line -> Tsukishima.

evening.text: ARRIVE Tsukishima. Walk to 'Monja Street'.
Dinner: Monja Moheji Flagship.
TRAIN: The Oedo Line Shortcut. Take the Toei Oedo Line directly from Tsukishima -> Ueno-Okachimachi Station (~14 mins).

morning.text: DEPART HOTEL. Walk to Ueno Station (~8 mins).
TRAIN: JR Yamanote Line -> Shinjuku Station.
ARRIVE Shinjuku. Follow signs to 'New South Gate' / 'Busta Shinjuku' (4F).
BUS: Highway Bus -> Kawaguchiko Station (Pre-booked).
ARRIVE Kawaguchiko. DECISION TIME (Bike vs Bus). Recommended: Walk to 'Fujisanbike' & Rent E-Bike.
CYCLE: Ride Counter-Clockwise towards Oishi Park. Keep Mt. Fuji in front of your face.
Oishi Park (The Rest Stop). MUST EAT: The famous Blueberry Soft Serve is here. Eat it with the Fuji view.

afternoon.text: CYCLE: Continue to Iyashi no Sato (~30-40 mins more).
Iyashi no Sato (Village). Explore the thatched houses. If you skipped soft serve, get Matcha here.
RETURN: Cycle back to Kawaguchiko Station Area.
Lunch: Sanrokuen. Robatayaki hearth experience. Alternative: Fuji Tempura Idaten.
Return Bikes / Shop at Station.
RAIL BAILOUT. Fuji Excursion Train (Kawaguchiko -> Shinjuku). Return Strategy: Train is recommended to guarantee dinner.

evening.text: Dinner: Tatsunoya Shinjuku. Walk from Shinjuku Stn (~10 mins). Rich Tsukemen. Queue moves fast.
TRAIN: Shinjuku -> Ueno. Enter via East Gate. Take JR Yamanote Line (Clockwise).

morning.text: DEPART HOTEL. Walk to Ueno Station (~8 mins).
TRAIN: JR Yamanote/Keihin-Tohoku Line -> Akihabara Station.
ARRIVE Akihabara. Electric Town Exit.
Radio Kaikan. 9 Floors of figures (Yellow Sign). Start at Radio Kaikan as soon as doors open to beat the crowds.
Lunch: Roast Beef Ohno OR Go Go Curry. Roast Beef Ohno is legendary in Akiba for its volcano-shaped wagyu beef bowls.

afternoon.text: Explore: Akihabara Backstreets (Junk Street). Check out Super Potato for retro games, and wander the alleys.
Arcade Run: GiGO or Taito Station. Try the UFO catchers or play some rhythm games on the upper floors.
Snack: Naruto Taiyaki Honpo. Freshly baked Taiyaki (Fish-shaped cake). Crispy thin skin. Great energy booster.

evening.text: DEPART Akihabara. Walk to Station.
TRAIN: Akihabara -> Shinjuku (JR Chuo/Sobu Line).
ARRIVE Shinjuku. Exit West Exit.
Photo Op: Omoide Yokocho ('Piss Alley'). Walk through the alley just to take cool neon cyberpunk photos, but DO NOT stop to eat here.
Sightseeing: The 3D Cat Billboard. Walk towards the East Exit to see the famous giant 3D Calico Cat billboard.
Dinner: Negishi (Beef Tongue Set Meals). The Clean Escape: 100% smoke-free, comfort food after a loud day.
RETURN: Shinjuku -> Ueno. Enter via East Gate. Take JR Yamanote Line -> Ueno.

morning.text: DEPART HOTEL. Walk to Ueno Station (~8 mins).
TRAIN: Ginza Line -> Asakusa Station.
ARRIVE Asakusa. Walk to Senso-ji Temple.
Snack: Kagetsudo Melonpan. The Jumbo Melonpan: Located to the left of the main hall. Freshly baked, warm, sugary crust.
WALK: Cross 'Sumida River Walk' bridge to Skytree (~20 mins).
THE TICKET PULL: Toriton Sushi (Solamachi 6F). Pull a queue ticket immediately. Expected wait: 90 mins.
Gap Filler: Go to Tower Yard 2F. Buy cookies and a 'Milk Pie' at Tokyo Milk Cheese Factory.

afternoon.text: Check Queue Status & Return.
Lunch: Toriton Sushi. Order 'Botan Ebi' (Huge Shrimp) and 'Aburi Salmon'.
Return to Asakusa (Walk or Train). Suzukien (Matcha Gelato).

evening.text: Dinner: Okonomiyaki Sometaro. Cook your own Okonomiyaki in a historic wooden house. Queue is worth it for the vibe.
RETURN: Ginza Line or Taxi. Option A (Train): Ginza Line -> Ueno. Option B (Luxury): Taxi.

morning.text: DEPART HOTEL. Train to Ikebukuro -> Kawagoe. Take the Tobu Tojo Line (Express or Rapid Express).
ARRIVE Kawagoe. Walk to Old Town. The town will be packed with festival energy.
Lunch: Ogakiku (Unagi) OR Mio Casalo. FESTIVAL WARNING: 1 million people visit this weekend. Go straight to the Ogakiku ticket machine immediately at 10:30.

afternoon.text: Kawagoe Festival (Daytime Floats). Eating hot Takoyaki from a festival stall with the floats passing by adds the critical 'vibe seasoning'.
Snack: Coedo Beer & Imokoi. Local sweet potato ale and dumplings.

evening.text: Hikkawase (Musical Battle). The main event. Lanterns lit, music battles at intersections. Unforgettable finale.
ESCAPE. Return to Ikebukuro.
Late Dinner: Mutekiya (Ikebukuro). Famous Tonkotsu to end the trip. REALITY CHECK: Queue might still be 45-60 mins. Pivot to Kikanbo or Hulu-lu if needed.
TRAIN: The Final Yamanote Ride. Route: JR Yamanote Line -> Ueno (~16 mins).

morning.text: CHECK OUT. Walk to Keisei-Ueno.
TRAIN: Keisei Skyliner to Narita. You need the ~07:40 train to be safe for 11:45 flight.
ARRIVE Narita Airport (3 Hours early).
Last Snack: Konbini Onigiri or Yoshinoya. Spend remaining coins.

afternoon.text: FLIGHT: Depart Tokyo.
